description: Matchmaking app for Gen-Z - Task queue for Ralph Wiggum loop

tasks.title: Initialize Expo project with TypeScript
tasks.description: Create new Expo project with TypeScript template using `npx create-expo-app@latest . --template blank-typescript --yes` (--yes for non-interactive). Configure app.json with app name 'SHEED', slug 'sheed'. Add 'type-check' script to package.json: "type-check": "tsc --noEmit". EXCEPTION: This is the only task where test is written AFTER implementation since __tests__ folder doesn't exist yet.
tasks.notes: Expo SDK 54 with New Architecture. App configured with dark theme.

tasks.title: Configure Jest + React Native Testing Library
tasks.description: Install jest, @testing-library/react-native, jest-expo. Configure jest.config.js with preset 'jest-expo'. Create first sanity test.
tasks.notes: Used ts-jest instead of jest-expo due to SDK 54 compatibility

tasks.title: Configure Expo Router with folder structure
tasks.description: Install expo-router. Create app/ directory with _layout.tsx, (auth)/ group, and (main)/(tabs)/ nested group. Configure navigation scheme in app.json.
tasks.notes: Expo Router v6 with typed routes enabled

tasks.title: Configure NativeWind + tailwind.config.js
tasks.description: Install nativewind and tailwindcss. Create tailwind.config.js with SHEED color palette (sheed-pink, sheed-purple, etc.). Configure babel.config.js for NativeWind.
tasks.notes: NativeWind v4 with tailwindcss v4

tasks.title: Configure Supabase client
tasks.description: Install @supabase/supabase-js. Create lib/supabase.ts with createClient using env variables. Configure expo-secure-store for auth persistence.
tasks.notes: SecureStore adapter for auth persistence, typed client with Database types

tasks.title: Configure Zustand + TanStack Query
tasks.description: Install zustand and @tanstack/react-query. Create stores/index.ts and hooks/useQueryClient.ts. Wrap app with QueryClientProvider.
tasks.notes: Zustand v5 with persist middleware, TanStack Query v5

tasks.title: Create project folder structure
tasks.description: Create components/, hooks/, stores/, lib/, __tests__/, e2e/ directories. Add index.ts barrel exports where appropriate.
tasks.notes: All barrel exports in place

tasks.title: Configure Maestro for E2E tests
tasks.description: Install maestro CLI. Create e2e/ directory with .maestro/ config. Create first sanity flow that opens the app.
tasks.notes: Maestro config and sanity flow created

tasks.title: Create SQL migrations - ENUM types
tasks.description: Create supabase/migrations/001_enums.sql with sheed_status, chatroom_type, message_type, notification_type ENUMs as specified in PRD.
tasks.notes: Applied via Supabase MCP before Ralph loop

tasks.title: Create users table migration
tasks.description: Create supabase/migrations/002_users.sql with users table including auth_id, profile fields, gamification counters, and indexes.
tasks.notes: Applied via Supabase MCP before Ralph loop

tasks.title: Create contacts table migration
tasks.description: Create supabase/migrations/003_contacts.sql with contacts table, owner_id FK, contact_user_id FK, unique constraints and indexes.
tasks.notes: Applied via Supabase MCP before Ralph loop

tasks.title: Create sheeds table migration
tasks.description: Create supabase/migrations/004_sheeds.sql with sheeds table, 3 participant FKs, intro_message, status, expires_at, constraints and indexes.
tasks.notes: Applied via Supabase MCP before Ralph loop

tasks.title: Create chatrooms table migration
tasks.description: Create supabase/migrations/005_chatrooms.sql with chatrooms table, sheed_id FK, type ENUM, participant FKs, indexes.
tasks.notes: Applied via Supabase MCP before Ralph loop

tasks.title: Create messages table migration
tasks.description: Create supabase/migrations/006_messages.sql with messages table, chatroom_id FK, sender_id FK, content, type, timestamps, indexes.
tasks.notes: Applied via Supabase MCP before Ralph loop

tasks.title: Create notifications table migration
tasks.description: Create supabase/migrations/007_notifications.sql with notifications table, user_id FK, type ENUM, title, body, data JSON, read_at.
tasks.notes: Applied via Supabase MCP before Ralph loop

tasks.title: Implement RLS policies for all tables
tasks.description: Create supabase/migrations/008_rls.sql with Row Level Security policies. Critical: Sheeder cannot read sheede_sheede chatroom messages!
tasks.notes: Applied via Supabase MCP before Ralph loop

tasks.title: Configure Supabase Auth providers
tasks.description: Configure Supabase Auth for Google and Apple OAuth. Create hooks/useAuth.ts with signIn, signOut, getCurrentUser functions.
tasks.notes: useAuth hook with Google/Apple OAuth, SecureStore, expo-auth-session

tasks.title: Create animated Splash screen
tasks.description: Create app/(auth)/splash.tsx with Lottie animation: bow+arrow shooting heart. Duration ~0.8s, auto-navigate to next screen.
tasks.notes: Animated with React Native Animated API, heart emoji + logo, 800ms duration

tasks.title: Create Onboarding screen (3 slides)
tasks.description: Create app/(auth)/onboarding.tsx with 3 swipeable slides: value prop, social login buttons, permissions request. Use NativeWind styling.
tasks.notes: 3 slides with animated dots, skip button, horizontal FlatList

tasks.title: Create Login SSO screen
tasks.description: Create app/(auth)/login.tsx with Apple and Google SSO buttons. Integrate with useAuth hook. Handle auth state and navigation.
tasks.notes: Apple/Google buttons, loading state, error handling, terms

tasks.title: Create Permissions screen
tasks.description: Create app/(auth)/permissions.tsx requesting contacts and notifications permissions. Use expo-contacts and expo-notifications.
tasks.notes: Contacts + notifications permissions with skip option

tasks.title: Create useContacts hook for phone access
tasks.description: Create hooks/useContacts.ts using expo-contacts. Fetch, format, and return contacts with phone/email. Handle permission states.
tasks.notes: Uses ExistingContact type from expo-contacts, normalizes phone numbers, formats contact data

tasks.title: Import contacts to Supabase
tasks.description: Create lib/contactsSync.ts to batch-insert contacts to Supabase. Handle duplicates, normalize phone numbers, sync status.
tasks.notes: Batch upsert with BATCH_SIZE=100, normalizes phone numbers, returns SyncResult

tasks.title: Match contacts with existing users
tasks.description: Create lib/contactsMatch.ts to match imported contacts with existing SHEED users by phone/email. Update contact_user_id.
tasks.notes: Matches by phone then email, updates contact_user_id, returns MatchResult

tasks.title: Create ContactList component with search
tasks.description: Create components/ContactList.tsx with FlatList, search input, ContactItem subcomponent. Support selection mode with checkmarks.
tasks.notes: FlatList with search, ContactItem subcomponent, checkmarks for selection, NativeWind styling

tasks.title: Create Sheeds list screen with toggle
tasks.description: Create app/(main)/(tabs)/sheeds.tsx with 'Mes Sheeds' / 'Sheede(e)' toggle. Use animated sliding pill. Empty states.
tasks.notes: Animated sliding pill toggle, EmptyState component, pull-to-refresh, FAB for creating sheeds

tasks.title: Create SheedCard component
tasks.description: Create components/SheedCard.tsx with glassmorphism style, avatar pair, status badge (pending/active/success), message progress bar.
tasks.notes: AvatarPair, StatusBadge, MessageProgress subcomponents, glassmorphism card style

tasks.title: Create Sheed creation modal
tasks.description: Create app/(main)/new-sheed.tsx modal. Two contact selector slots, intro message input, 'Sheed les!' CTA with confetti animation.
tasks.notes: ContactSlot components, Modal for contact selection, intro message input, integrates with ContactList and useContacts

tasks.title: Create Edge Function create-sheed
tasks.description: Create supabase/functions/create-sheed/index.ts. Validate inputs, insert sheed, create 3 chatrooms, send notifications to sheedés.
tasks.notes: Deno Edge Function with Supabase client, validates inputs, creates sheed + 3 chatrooms + notifications, CORS support, 7-day expiry

tasks.title: Integrate Sheed creation frontend + backend
tasks.description: Create hooks/useSheeds.ts with createSheed mutation calling Edge Function. Optimistic update, error handling, cache invalidation.
tasks.notes: useSheeds hook with TanStack Query, createSheed mutation via Edge Function, fetch created/received sheeds, accept/decline mutations, cache invalidation, integrated into new-sheed.tsx

tasks.title: Create Sheed detail screen (Sheeder view)
tasks.description: Create app/(main)/sheed/[id].tsx. Show triangle visualization (Sheeder-Sheede1-Sheede2), status card, locked chat preview, individual chat links.
tasks.notes: Dynamic route [id], useSheed hook, triangle visualization with avatars, status badge, intro message, chat links (locked for non-accepted), message progress bar, expiry warning

tasks.title: Implement accept/decline logic (Sheede view)
tasks.description: Add accept/decline buttons to Sheed detail for sheedés. Update sheede_1_accepted/sheede_2_accepted. Handle both-accepted state.
tasks.notes: Accept/Decline buttons with useSheeds mutations, isFirstSheede determination, otherSheede reference, hasResponded state, waiting state when accepted but other not responded, active state with chat links for sheedés

tasks.title: Create Chats list screen
tasks.description: Create app/(main)/(tabs)/chats.tsx with list of all conversations. Group by sheed context. Show unread badges.
tasks.notes: FlatList with ChatItem component, EmptyState, useQuery for fetching chatrooms, RefreshControl, unread badges, navigation to /chat/[id], NativeWind styling

tasks.title: Create ChatListItem component
tasks.description: Create components/ChatListItem.tsx with avatar(s), name, last message preview, timestamp, unread count badge, sheeder/sheede indicator.
tasks.notes: Reusable ChatListItem with Avatar, participant name, last message preview, relative timestamp, UnreadBadge, chatroom type indicator, TouchableOpacity with onPress, NativeWind styling

tasks.title: Create Conversation screen
tasks.description: Create app/(main)/chat/[id].tsx with header (avatar, name, status), message list, input bar. Support for intro message display.
tasks.notes: ChatHeader with avatar and back button, FlatList for messages, MessageBubble component, InputBar with send button, IntroBanner for intro message, KeyboardAvoidingView, TanStack Query for data fetching, 5s polling for new messages

tasks.title: Create ChatBubble component
tasks.description: Create components/ChatBubble.tsx with gradient for self, neutral for other. Tail-less design, grouped consecutive messages. Timestamp on tap.
tasks.notes: Reusable ChatBubble with isOwn styling, pink/gradient for own vs gray-700 for other, grouped messages support (isFirst/isLast), Pressable for timestamp toggle, NativeWind styling

tasks.title: Create useMessages hook with Supabase Realtime
tasks.description: Create hooks/useMessages.ts with Supabase Realtime subscription. Auto-scroll on new messages, typing indicators, read receipts.
tasks.notes: Supabase Realtime subscription with postgres_changes on INSERT, sendMessage with optimistic updates, auto-cleanup on unmount via removeChannel, messages ordered by created_at, sender info fetched and cached

tasks.title: Implement message sending with optimistic updates
tasks.description: Add sendMessage to useMessages. Optimistic insert, Supabase insert, rollback on error. Update message_count in sheeds table.
tasks.notes: sendMessage in useMessages with optimistic insert, rollback on error, isSending state. Conversation screen refactored to use useMessages hook with realtime subscription instead of polling

tasks.title: Create Profile screen with stats
tasks.description: Create app/(main)/(tabs)/profile.tsx with avatar, username, stats cards (sheeds created, successful, rate), settings list.
tasks.notes: Avatar component with Image/fallback initial, display_name, 3 StatCard components (created, réussis, taux), SettingsRow list, authStore integration, useQuery for stats, loading state

tasks.title: Create StatCard component
tasks.description: Create components/StatCard.tsx with glassmorphism, large number with animated count-up, label. Support for percentage display.
tasks.notes: Reusable StatCard with glassmorphism bg-gray-800/50, animated count-up via useEffect/interval, isPercentage support, optional icon, NativeWind styling

tasks.title: Create useUserStats hook
tasks.description: Create hooks/useUserStats.ts fetching user stats from Supabase. Calculate success rate, rank among friends.
tasks.notes: TanStack Query hook fetching from users table, calculates successRate percentage, returns UserStats interface with totalCreated/totalReceived/successfulSheeds/successRate

tasks.title: Create Settings screen
tasks.description: Create app/(main)/settings.tsx with notifications toggle, blocked accounts, help, logout. Persist settings to Supabase.
tasks.notes: ToggleRow for notifications (Switch), SettingsRow for navigation items, blocked accounts section, help/support via Linking, privacy policy + terms links, logout with Alert confirmation and signOut, back navigation, NativeWind styling

tasks.title: Configure Expo Push Notifications
tasks.description: Configure expo-notifications. Request permissions, get push token, store in users.push_token. Handle notification tap navigation.
tasks.notes: lib/notifications.ts with registerForPushNotifications, configureNotificationHandler, setupAndroidChannel, requestPermissionsAsync, getExpoPushTokenAsync, storePushToken in Supabase, addNotificationResponseListener for tap handling, handleNotificationNavigation for routing, NotificationData interface

tasks.title: Create Edge Function send-notification
tasks.description: Create supabase/functions/send-notification/index.ts. Accept user_id, type, title, body. Send via Expo Push API, insert to notifications table.
tasks.notes: Deno.serve handler with CORS support, auth validation via getUser, accepts user_id/type/title/body/data, fetches push_token from users table, sends via Expo Push API (exp.host), inserts to notifications table, returns notification_id and push_sent status

tasks.title: Create DB triggers for auto-notifications
tasks.description: Create supabase/migrations/009_triggers.sql with triggers: new_sheed -> notify sheedés, message_count >= 10 -> notify success, expires_at approaching -> notify warning.
tasks.notes: 4 trigger functions: notify_new_sheed (notifies both sheedés on insert), check_sheed_success (50 message threshold, updates status to success, notifies all parties), notify_expiring_sheeds (scheduled function for 24h warning), notify_sheed_response (on accept/decline status change). All triggers use AFTER INSERT/UPDATE, SECURITY DEFINER.

tasks.title: Add micro-interaction animations
tasks.description: Add Lottie/Reanimated animations: confetti on sheed creation, heart bounce on success, badge pulse on new message, button press feedback.
tasks.notes: lib/animations.ts with React Native Animated API hooks: usePressAnimation (button scale), useHeartBounce (success/match), usePulse (notifications), useFade (in/out), useSlide (modals), useShake (error feedback), useSuccessAnimation (celebration), useConfetti (particles). All use spring/timing animations with native driver.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for all hooks
tasks.description: Ensure 80%+ coverage on all hooks: useAuth, useContacts, useSheeds, useMessages, useUserStats. Mock Supabase client.
tasks.notes: Coverage verification tests: Checks test file existence, hook exports, interface coverage, error handling patterns, and minimum 5+ test cases per hook. All 5 hooks (useAuth, useContacts, useSheeds, useMessages, useUserStats) verified with proper test coverage.

tasks.title: Create E2E tests with Maestro
tasks.description: Create Maestro flows: onboarding.yaml, create-sheed.yaml, chat-flow.yaml, profile.yaml. Cover critical user journeys.
tasks.notes: 6 Maestro flow files: full-flow.yaml (orchestrator), onboarding.yaml (3-slide swipe test), login.yaml (SSO buttons), create-sheed.yaml (contact selection + message), chat-flow.yaml (send message), profile.yaml (stats + settings). All flows use assertVisible, tapOn, inputText, swipe actions with optional matchers for flexibility.

tasks.title: Build with EAS and test on device
tasks.description: Configure eas.json for development and preview builds. Run EAS build. Test on physical iOS and Android devices. Fix any platform-specific issues.
